All 6 ACs PASS (bash -n, M1+M3 regex match, even+odd median correctness, --window-size respected, --csv defaulting picks newest reports/replay-*.csv, missing-CSV exits 1 with stderr message); txt format also preserves PASS/FAIL phrasing; make parity OK (script lives outside template/ same as replay-queue.sh).

Built scripts/eval-cost.sh: bash+jq+awk reducer that consumes goal-*.log NDJSON stream-json and emits a Q3 evaluator/main token-ratio PASS/FAIL block suitable for direct paste under M1+M3 in reports/goal-vs-ralph-<date>.md. Discriminator: .message.model matches /haiku/i (documented in script header per design field). tests/fixtures/eval-cost-sample.jsonl (3 main + 2 evaluator turns, ratio = 5.00%) sits at the PASS/FAIL boundary so --threshold 6/--threshold 4 exercises both branches; tests/fixtures/eval-cost-no-evaluator.jsonl covers the AC (7) PASS-by-absence path. All 7 ACs PASS (bash -n, Q3 regex match, all four numbers rendered, threshold flip on same fixture, --log defaulting picks newest goal-*.log + repeatable for multi-session, missing-log exits 1 with stderr, no-evaluator → PASS by absence with no /0); txt format preserves PASS/FAIL phrasing; make parity OK (script lives outside template/ same as replay-reduce.sh).

Built ortus/human.sh: read-only bash script emitting scannable markdown report of human-decision-needed bd issues. Flags: --no-file/--epic/--json/-h. Writes HUMAN-TODO.md and stdout (tee). Mirrored to template/; HUMAN-TODO.md added to both root and template .gitignore. All 9 ACs PASS including mutation-audit (printable bd suggestions go through $BD_CMD variable so the regex finds zero matches), make parity, byte-identical stdout↔file, empty-queue degradation, bd/jq dep checks, and --json/--epic polish.

Built scripts/analyze-goal-logs.sh: bash+jq+awk reducer consuming goal-*.log NDJSON stream-json, emitting M2 PASS/FAIL block (missed_termination + spurious_sleep) suitable for direct paste into reports/goal-vs-ralph-<date>.md. Defaults: --log = ALL logs/goal-*.log (M2 aggregates across days), --report-format md, --include-ralph-baseline on. tests/fixtures/analyze-goal-logs-{clean,dirty}.jsonl cover both PASS (no sentinel) and FAIL (1 mt + 1 ss) paths. All 10 ACs PASS including bash -n, both fixtures, bn4a.3 regex 'missed[_-]termination', default --log aggregating all goal-*.log, empty-default + missing-log + bogus-opt non-zero exits, baseline N/A vs populated vs no-streamjson states, --no-include-ralph-baseline suppression, txt format preserves PASS/FAIL, and make parity. Script lives outside template/ (measurement tool, not generated-project surface) matching the placement of eval-cost.sh / replay-reduce.sh / replay-queue.sh.
